identity.name: E1
identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.

theme_strategy.description: High-visibility, precision, and trust. A clean, professional environment for serious business.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H6. Tight tracking (tracking-tight) for sizes above 32px.

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, labels, and inputs. Highly legible.

accent.name: Safety Orange
accent.usage: Use STRICTLY for Primary CTAs (Sign Up, Buy Lead) and critical alerts.

rules: No Gradients on Buttons. Flat, high-contrast only.
Text on colored backgrounds must be White (#FFFFFF).

buttons.primary: bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-700 text-white font-semibold px-8 py-3 rounded-md shadow-sm transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-300 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-md
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100 px-4 py-2 rounded-md

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
cards.listing: relative overflow-hidden group border border-slate-200 bg-white rounded-lg p-0

inputs.base: h-11 border-slate-300 focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-orange-500 rounded-md bg-white

badges.status: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium

visual_enhancers.blur_overlays: Use backdrop-blur-md bg-white/60 to hide contact info for non-paying users.
visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise texture on the main background to reduce digital sterility.

general: Implement the 'Blur Overlay' logic for project details immediately. This is the core business model.
Use the 'Bento Grid' for the project listing page.
Ensure the 'Rating System' is prominent on profile pages.
The 'Orange' accent color is ONLY for conversion actions. Do not overuse it.

specific_pages.landing: Split screen hero. Left: 'For Homeowners' (Clean interior image). Right: 'For Pros' (Blueprint/Worker image). Clear value prop.
specific_pages.project_details: Locked state must look enticing. Show 'Project Type', 'Location', 'Budget' clearly, but blur 'Phone' and 'Email'.
specific_pages.dashboard: High density. Use tables for leads. Use badges for status.

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
